welcome_offer.description: Earn 60,000 TrueBlue bonus points after spending $1,000 on purchases and paying the annual fee in full, both within the first 90 days.
notes: P1 adaptor added for airline niche coverage; keep only if public offer remains elevated or KC has JetBlue use case.

earning_rates.notes: 6x TrueBlue points on eligible JetBlue purchases
2x TrueBlue points at eligible grocery stores
1x TrueBlue point per $1 on all other purchases

other_benefits.name: 5,000 anniversary bonus points
other_benefits.description: Earn 5,000 bonus points each year after the JetBlue Plus Card account anniversary.

other_benefits.name: Free first checked bag
other_benefits.description: First checked bag free for the primary cardmember and up to 3 eligible companions on JetBlue-operated flights.

other_benefits.name: 10% points back on award flights
other_benefits.description: Get 10% of points back after redeeming for and traveling on a JetBlue-operated award flight.

other_benefits.name: JetBlue Vacations statement credit
other_benefits.description: Receive a statement credit after purchasing a qualifying JetBlue Vacations package of $100 or more; limit one per year.

other_benefits.name: 50% inflight savings
other_benefits.description: Savings on eligible inflight purchases on JetBlue-operated flights.

other_benefits.name: No foreign transaction fees
other_benefits.description: No foreign transaction fees on international purchases.

sources.notes: Barclays official JetBlue Plus Card page; verified 2026-06-13.
JetBlue Plus card landing page; corroborates anniversary points and benefits.
